title: rubus verticalis
intro: Rubus verticalis, also known as the thimbleberry, is a perennial shrub belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae), native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus verticalis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in jams, jellies, and other food products.
